user.title: Basic Configuration
user.description: EMHASS URL and main sensors. All fields are pre-filled with known system entities.

ath.description: Daikin Altherma sensors via ESPAltherma. Pre-filled with your system entities.

data.use_cop: Use real COP sensor for thermal calculations

global_sensors.title: PV · Battery · Grid Sensors
global_sensors.description: Huawei SUN2000 / LUNA2000 sensors. Pre-filled with your system entities.

zone.description: Configure comfort zone. Pre-filled with Daikin Altherma zone entities.

data.zone_demand_weight: Demand Weight (relative priority vs other zones)

data_description.zone_demand_weight: Will be auto-calibrated. Initial value is a guide.
data_description.zone_temp_secondary: Averaged with primary for operative temperature

companion_advanced.title: Companion App & Advanced Options
companion_advanced.description: Optional Companion App (RC/ML models) and buffer tank configuration.

data_description.companion_app_enabled: Requires Docker container running on local network
data_description.buffer_tank_liters: Used to calculate exploitable solar kWh

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to EMHASS. Check URL and that EMHASS add-on is running.

abort.already_configured: EMHASS HVAC Optimizer is already configured.

force_emhass_mpc.name: Force EMHASS MPC
force_emhass_mpc.description: Trigger an immediate EMHASS MPC optimisation cycle with enriched payload.

run_autotuner.name: Run AutoTuner
run_autotuner.description: Execute a full auto-calibration cycle (or specific target).

set_zone_schedule.name: Set Zone Schedule
set_zone_schedule.description: Update comfort schedule for a zone.

set_zone_demand_weight.name: Set Zone Demand Weight
set_zone_demand_weight.description: Manually set demand weight for a zone.

force_seasonal_mode.name: Force Seasonal Mode
force_seasonal_mode.description: Force MSC, TOU, or revert to automatic evaluation.

calibrate_ac_limit.name: Calibrate AC Charge Limit
calibrate_ac_limit.description: Force AC charge limit calibration from recorder history.

send_companion_training.name: Send Companion Training
send_companion_training.description: Send 7-day historical data to Companion App for RC/ML training.

set_setpoint_offset.name: Set Setpoint Offset
set_setpoint_offset.description: Apply a temporary temperature offset to a zone setpoint.
